query:
ALTER TABLE subscriptionTiers 
CHANGE COLUMN display_name displayName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
CHANGE COLUMN monthly_price monthlyPrice DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
CHANGE COLUMN max_vehicles maxVehicles INT,
CHANGE COLUMN max_clients maxClients INT,
CHANGE COLUMN max_users maxUsers INT,
CHANGE COLUMN created_at createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
CHANGE COLUMN updated_at updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL;
